name: get_garbage_info
description: Get detailed garbage collection information for a specific municipality in Japan, including collection schedules, sorting rules, bag requirements, and disposal methods. Call this when users ask about garbage, trash, recycling, waste disposal, or ゴミ for a specific area. If no municipality is specified, returns a list of available municipalities.

parameters.name: municipality
parameters.description: Municipality name in Japanese (e.g., '渋谷区') or English (e.g., 'Shibuya'). If omitted, returns available municipalities.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Specific garbage category to query (e.g., '燃えるゴミ', 'burnable', 'recyclable', '粗大ゴミ'). If omitted, returns all categories.
